triggers: Subject contains: fleet request, pricing and availability, quote request, PO#, purchase order, please ship, order, RFP, RFQ, bid request
Subject contains $ amounts or quantities (e.g., $500, 10x, 5 units)
Customer email from unknown domain (not BSS, Google, UPS, etc.)
Customer reply on existing thread (if Aaron is on To/CC)
Key contacts: Herb Minatre, Thayne Grove, Troy Gongwer, Donna Poll, Sarah Daniels, Nick Gordon, Andrew Jarmoszuk, Dale Williams, Nick Jarmoszuk Jr
BSS emails meeting territory filter (AL MS LA TN GA SC NC KY, top 1/3 FL)
BSS emails addressed to Aaron or with call to action
BSS: Ready Rigs/Paint Schedule from Johnna, commission/retainer/agreement, RCOO, product/pricing updates
Skylift order reports or open order reports
Subject contains: invoice, payment, overdue, past due, statement
Known vendors/conferences: EUFMC (eufmc.org)
Google security alerts with unknown device/location
